creator: merlyn@geeks.org
text:
Things are better now, thanks. $ ping6 update2.freebsd.org PING6(56=40+8+8 bytes) 2001:4980:2:0:250:56ff:fe99:3980 --> 2620:11c:5001:1099:1337::117 16 bytes from 2620:11c:5001:1099:1337::117, icmp_seq=0 hlim=56 time=44.075 ms 16 bytes from 2620:11c:5001:1099:1337::117, icmp_seq=1 hlim=56 time=43.854 ms ^C $ traceroute6 update2.freebsd.org traceroute6 to update2.FreeBSD.org (2620:11c:5001:1099:1337::117) from 2001:4980:2:0:250:56ff:fe99:3980, 64 hops max, 20 byte packets 1 fwgw6 0.377 ms 0.347 ms 0.373 ms 2 gw6 1.728 ms 1.196 ms 1.492 ms 3 2001:4980:0:10::188 1.596 ms 1.019 ms 1.075 ms 4 ae5-820.edge2.Newark1.Level3.net 1.346 ms 1.667 ms 1.684 ms 5 * * * 6 GTT-level3-Minnesota.Level3.net 38.556 ms 8.113 ms 2.774 ms 7 2001:668:0:2:ffff:0:5995:8222 71.472 ms 43.986 ms 44.828 ms 8 2001:668:0:3:ffff:2:0:1952 44.912 ms 44.089 ms 44.460 ms 9 2620:11c:5001:982:: 46.473 ms 83.537 ms 58.450 ms 10 update2.freebsd.org 55.684 ms 47.305 ms 50.263 ms $ curl -6 http://update2.freebsd.org/ 403 Forbidden
